title: Add contact information section with Instagram link

requirements.text: Add a public contact information area to the site so visitors can find the photographer’s contact details and an Instagram profile link.

quotes: Make a spot for contact information and instagram link.

acceptanceCriteria: The public UI includes a clearly labeled contact area that is visible site-wide (e.g., in the footer) without requiring login.
The contact area displays at least: an email line (or equivalent contact method) and an Instagram link.
The Instagram link uses a standard external anchor (<a>) that opens in a new tab and includes rel="noopener noreferrer".
All user-facing labels are in English (e.g., "Contact", "Email", "Instagram").
The UI remains responsive (looks acceptable on mobile and desktop) and matches the existing visual theme.

requirements.text: Make the contact details (email text and Instagram URL/handle) easy to update by centralizing them in a single frontend constant/config location and rendering from that source in the contact area.

quotes: Make a spot for contact information and instagram link.

acceptanceCriteria: Contact details are not hard-coded in multiple components; they come from a single exported constant/config.
Updating the config values updates the displayed contact info and Instagram link across the app without additional code changes.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui (read-only Shadcn components).
Do not modify any paths listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Do not add new backend canisters or external services; keep changes within the existing React + Motoko single-actor app.
nonGoals: Implementing a new backend data model for contact information.
Adding a full contact form, messaging system, email sending, or social-media API integrations.
Adding third-party authentication beyond Internet Identity.
